Klasse Move

java.lang.Object
persistance.Move
public class Move extends Object
Represents a snapshot of the game state at a particular moment. Used for undo and redo functionality in the History.

  • Feldübersicht

    Felder
    Modifizierer und Typ

    private final int

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Move(int placedStonesWhite, int placedStonesBlack, Map<Integer,Node> boardSnapshot, boolean currentIsWhite, GamePhase phaseWhite, GamePhase phaseBlack, int noMillTurnCounter, int timeLeft)
    Constructs a Move object representing the game state at a specific moment.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    Map<Integer,Node>
    getBoardSnapshot()
    Returns the snapshot of the board when this move was made.
    boolean
    getCurrentIsWhite()
    Returns whether it is currently the white player's turn.
    int
    getNoMillTurnCounter()
    Returns the number of turns without a formed mill at the time of this move.
    GamePhase
    getPhaseBlack()
    Returns the game phase for the black player at the time of this move.
    GamePhase
    getPhaseWhite()
    Returns the game phase for the white player at the time of this move.
    int
    getPlacedStonesBlack()
    Returns the number of stones the black player has already placed.
    int
    getPlacedStonesWhite()
    Returns the number of stones the white player has already placed.
    int
    getTimeLeft()
    Returns the time left for the move in seconds.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • placedStonesWhite

      private final int placedStonesWhite

    • placedStonesBlack

      private final int timeLeft

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Move

      public Move(int placedStonesWhite, int placedStonesBlack, Map<Integer,Node> boardSnapshot, boolean currentIsWhite, GamePhase phaseWhite, GamePhase phaseBlack, int noMillTurnCounter, int timeLeft)
      Constructs a Move object representing the game state at a specific moment.
      Parameter:
      placedStonesWhite - The number of stones placed by the white player.
      placedStonesBlack - The number of stones placed by the black player.
      boardSnapshot - A snapshot of the board state at this move.
      currentIsWhite - Indicates if it is currently the white player's turn.
      phaseWhite - The game phase for the white player.
      phaseBlack - The game phase for the black player.
      noMillTurnCounter - The number of turns without a formed mill.
      timeLeft - The time left for the move in seconds.

  • Methodendetails

    • getPlacedStonesWhite

      public int getPlacedStonesWhite()
      Returns the number of stones the white player has already placed.
      Gibt zurück:
      The amount of placed stones.

    • getPlacedStonesBlack

      public int getPlacedStonesBlack()
      Returns the number of stones the black player has already placed.
      Gibt zurück:
      The amount of placed stones.

    • getBoardSnapshot

      public Map<Integer,Node> getBoardSnapshot()
      Returns the snapshot of the board when this move was made.
      Gibt zurück:
      A map representing the board state.

    • getCurrentIsWhite

      public boolean getCurrentIsWhite()
      Returns whether it is currently the white player's turn.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if it is white's turn, false otherwise.

    • getPhaseWhite

      public GamePhase getPhaseWhite()
      Returns the game phase for the white player at the time of this move.
      Gibt zurück:
      The game phase for white.

    • getPhaseBlack

      public GamePhase getPhaseBlack()
      Returns the game phase for the black player at the time of this move.
      Gibt zurück:
      The game phase for black.

    • getNoMillTurnCounter

      public int getNoMillTurnCounter()
      Returns the number of turns without a formed mill at the time of this move.
      Gibt zurück:
      The no mill turn counter.

    • getTimeLeft

      public int getTimeLeft()
      Returns the time left for the move in seconds.
      Gibt zurück:
      The remaining time.
